channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Our street light is not coming on it is right out side our house our house number is 58 Meadowleaze Gloucester GL2 0PS, 4th May
item.description:
Our light isnt coming on and it is dark out the street light is out side 58 Meadowleaze Gloucester GL2 0PS it hasn’t been on since yesterday night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bear 27 willowleaze, 4th May
item.description:
Multiple pot holes along willowleaze.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Willowleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs from contractors left at multiple places near the roundabout, 4th May
item.description:
Leftover signs from previous work need to be collected
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, The Cloisters, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Pothole next to drain cover, 4th May
item.description:
Previous tarmac repair around drain cover has disintegrated leaving a big hole that can damage tires and wheels
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramble Chase, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking utilities cover in pavement with brocken bricks., 4th May
item.description:
The cover is loose and seesaws when stepped on causing the edges to come up. The bricks surrounding the sides are also loose and lift up with the cover. Neighbours are elderly and I'm worried they will trip.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Furlong Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 4th May
item.description:
Multiple potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Willowleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 4th May
item.description:
Multiple potholes on this road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Meadowleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Teenagers have left a lot of rubbish, 4th May
item.description:
Teenagers have created a den in the nature reserve, they have dammed the stream and left a lot rubbish. They are there most evenings and there is also a smell of drugs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chargrove Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a broken kerb stone on Priors Rd outside Harp Hill Mews, 4th May
item.description:
There is a broken kerb stone on Priors Rd outside Harp Hill Mews

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Priors Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Route closed, 4th May
item.description:
The PROW leading up to this bridge is not maintain. It is barely passable. The bridge has also been closed and I’m unsure if this is a legitimate closure.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole near a drain cover, 4th May
item.description:
At the end of cobham road near the block of flats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Cobham Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: 3 Large potholes on Norfolk Avenue entrance by Cambridge Avenue, 4th May
item.description:
Road intersection
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Norfolk Avenue, Rowanfield, Cheltenham

item.title: Pot hole and edge in front of drain cover, 4th May
item.description:
The pot hole and sharp edge in front of the drain cover surface are located near the bus stop. ///estate.closes.editor When buses or trucks go over this, the houses in our road shake and reverberate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Voxwell Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes in middle of road, 4th May
item.description:
Multiple potholes along Road - difficult to avoid due to parked cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Lansdown Parade, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorcycle dumped in alleyway very near brook, 4th May
item.description:
Motorcycle probably stolen and dumped in alleyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Gristmill Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Large pothole on Blacksmith`s Lane, 4th May
item.description:
Large and deep pothole outside Bishops Cottage, Blacksmith`s Lane, The Leigh.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmith Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree debris falling onto private property, 4th May
item.description:
The trees on brooklyn road need significantly cutting back/trimming. The one outside our house (146) is constantly creating unnecessary mess on our property and branches and debris are constantly falling on our vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 146, Brooklyn Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: Large pothole on Blacksmith`s Lane, 4th May
item.description:
Deep pothole just up from entrance to Brickhill Farmhouse, on the corner going up the hill.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmith Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on Blacksmith`s Lane, The Leigh, 4th May
item.description:
Several deep potholes outside Holborn Farm, Blacksmith`s Lane, The Leigh. Road eroded, difficult to drive on and potential to damage vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmith Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 4th May
item.description:
pothole - no damdge to vehicle - bigger than a dinner plate
